findings.title: Circular dependency (17 modules)
findings.description: Cycle: annotated_types.py → class_validators.py → color.py → config.py → dataclasses.py → error_wrappers.py → errors.py → fields.py → json.py → main.py → networks.py → parse.py → schema.py → types.py → typing.py → utils.py → validators.py
findings.fix: Zirkuläre Abhängigkeit (17 Module): annotated_types.py → class_validators.py → color.py → config.py → dataclasses.py → error_wrappers.py → errors.py → fields.py → json.py → main.py → networks.py → parse.py → schema.py → types.py → typing.py → utils.py → validators.py. Breche Zyklus durch Interface-Extraktion oder Dependency Inversion.
